query:
-- Search for the account by address or partial name
SELECT externalId, name, xeroContactName, status, monthlyRevenue, monthlyCost, serviceCount
FROM customers
WHERE name LIKE '%Massage%' OR name LIKE '%77 Mooloolaba%' OR name LIKE '%94152%';

-- Look for SasBoss services that might belong to Mooloolaba Osteopathy (unmatched or with that address)
SELECT s.externalId, s.planName, s.serviceType, s.provider, s.status,
       s.monthlyCost, s.monthlyRevenue, s.customerExternalId, s.customerName, s.locationAddress
FROM services s
WHERE s.locationAddress LIKE '%Mooloolaba ESP%' OR s.locationAddress LIKE '%77 Mooloolaba%'
   OR s.customerName LIKE '%Massage%' OR s.customerName LIKE '%Osteopathy%';

-- Check billing items for Mooloolaba Osteopathy and Massage Centre
SELECT bi.externalId, bi.description, bi.lineAmount, bi.quantity, bi.matchStatus, bi.contactName, bi.serviceExternalId
FROM billing_items bi
WHERE bi.contactName LIKE '%Massage%' OR bi.contactName LIKE '%Osteopathy%' OR bi.contactName LIKE '%Mooloolaba Osteo%';

-- Check if there are unmatched SasBoss services with UCXcel Essential or eFax (unique to this customer)
SELECT s.externalId, s.planName, s.serviceType, s.provider, s.status,
       s.monthlyCost, s.monthlyRevenue, s.customerExternalId, s.customerName
FROM services s
WHERE s.planName LIKE '%UCXcel Essential%' OR s.planName LIKE '%eFax%'
ORDER BY s.customerExternalId;

-- Search for the account by address or partial name
SELECT externalId, name, xeroContactName, status, monthlyRevenue, monthlyCost, serviceCount
FROM customers
WHERE name LIKE '%Massage%' OR name LIKE '%77 Mooloolaba%' OR name LIKE '%94152%';

-- Look for SasBoss services that might belong to Mooloolaba Osteopathy (unmatched or with that address)
SELECT s.externalId, s.planName, s.serviceType, s.provider, s.status,
       s.monthlyCost, s.monthlyRevenue, s.customerExternalId, s.customerName, s.locationAddress
FROM services s
WHERE s.locationAddress LIKE '%Mooloolaba ESP%' OR s.locationAddress LIKE '%77 Mooloolaba%'
   OR s.customerName LIKE '%Massage%' OR s.customerName LIKE '%Osteopathy%';

-- Check billing items for Mooloolaba Osteopathy and Massage Centre
SELECT bi.externalId, bi.description, bi.lineAmount, bi.quantity, bi.matchStatus, bi.contactName, bi.serviceExternalId
FROM billing_items bi
WHERE bi.contactName LIKE '%Massage%' OR bi.contactName LIKE '%Osteopathy%' OR bi.contactName LIKE '%Mooloolaba Osteo%';

-- Check if there are unmatched SasBoss services with UCXcel Essential or eFax (unique to this customer)
SELECT s.externalId, s.planName, s.serviceType, s.provider, s.status,
       s.monthlyCost, s.monthlyRevenue, s.customerExternalId, s.customerName
FROM services s
WHERE s.planName LIKE '%UCXcel Essential%' OR s.planName LIKE '%eFax%'
ORDER BY s.customerExternalId;
